reviews.author: Alvin Roc
reviews.text: Leedon Residence is a very beautiful condo, beautiful environment, green is very good, the design is very beautiful.

reviews.author: PP Sut
reviews.text: Every Sunday there are noisy, loud mop meetings in the apartment. You should rent the highest floor, and only two of the four lifts are available, leading to long waiting times.

reviews.author: Shaikh Nisar
reviews.text: Most welcome to everyone, good place for chill out and relax...

reviews.author: Will Daniels
reviews.text: Fine as ti's low cost. Lifts are dated and sowm buttons don't work. Bedrooms are small. Kitchen has usual features. Basic and low cost

reviews.text: The lady was SOO sweet she booked us a cab and she was so polite. The rooms were clean and good the wifi was a bit lagging and theres toilet paper which is kind of a problem for muslims but thats fine i assume. Overall for the price its not that bad

name: Room in a 3 Bedroom Apartment, 2 Kovan Rd

reviews.author: kunal lalvani
reviews.text: Well kept Condo, just close to MRT. Clean, people are nice, lot of activities in condo. Great place to stay!

reviews.author: M
reviews.text: Close to Kovan MRT, there’s a bit of a walk from Kovan MRT to the front gate like 10 minutes a bit of a slope. reviews.author: Wayne
reviews.text: Great location, directly above Kovan MRT. Blocks are very close to each other though.

reviews.author: Worldy
reviews.text: So many pools (seriously I lost count😂) and bbq areas like a resort, a gem in the city. reviews.author: Faris Aminn
reviews.text: NOT delivery friendly. Most hassle procedure ever. Have to park all the way to the end and park our car at visitor lot. Lack of signage to tell us where to go next. End up I have to go down to level B from UB and find the tower by walking in the hot basement carpark. 10 minutes of just delivery

reviews.author: Milan John
reviews.text: I had a wonderful stay at the Nest Hotel in Singapore. The location is very convenient, just a 5-minute walk to both the Lavender and Bendemeer MRT stations, making it easy to get around the city. A special mention to Alice at the reception, who was exceptionally warm and accommodating. She arranged an early check-in a

reviews.author: Muhammad Zulfadli
reviews.text: Had a great experience staying with Nest Hotel, very pleased with the cleanliness and very pleasant layout of the hotel lobby. Very pleasant and caring hotel attendants especially Alice, she’s very caring and ensures that my stay at Nest Hotel is very enjoyable. Keep up with the good work!

reviews.author: Caren Griffin
reviews.text: Nice for the price. Staff was accommodating and helpful. There was not a separate shower stall which would have been fine except could not get warm/hot water with it. Otherwise nice for the price.

reviews.author: Jaakko Ahvo
reviews.text: I stayed here on October 30th and wanted to extend for one more night. reviews.author: Alva Larsson
reviews.text: Lovely, clean and quiet. Great host in reception and breakfast included. I opted for the 22-bed female dorm. The dorm was really quite and beds private, I felt it could have been a 4-bed dorm! Good wi-fi and clean shared bathrooms. Thanks for the stay, I would stay again for sure.

reviews.author: Charmaine
reviews.text: I don't understand the negative reviews! Anyway, I've set my expectations to what's actually obvious. It's a hostel so noise and cramped bed space are expected. First of all, I wish I knew there was free breakfast 😭😅 I think this should be explicitly mentioned during the check in. I was only told there's complimentary

reviews.author: Emily
reviews.text: Mixed development so very convenient with sheng shiong supermarket, eateries, clinics, fast food just below. There's also multiple coffeeshops and wet market etc within walking distance. Yishun polyclinic is 5 min walk away

reviews.author: Daniel Tan
reviews.text: Great mixed residential with shopping mall. Although it's not as big as other neighborhood malls, there is still Shengsiong supermarket, foodcourt, nice cafes and restaurants. There is also Luckin coffee, Korean and Sushi restaurants newly opened.

reviews.author: chetan shah
reviews.text: Its junction 9 catch up with Residence Lots of eateries, shops and Parking available
